description: rag-plugin hooks, all routed through hooks/hook_launcher.py via a fail-open inline bootstrap (D-031, v0.15.1). Each command runs `python3 -c <bootstrap> <name> <fallback> || python -c ... || py -3 -c ...`: the `-c` form takes no script-file argument, so an unresolved ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} / missing script can never make Python exit 2 (the only blocking code) — and the interpreter chain lets the hook run where `python3` is not the name (a missing interpreter is non-blocking by spec). (1) PreToolUse Bash lock-conflict guard (GUARDED mode: its `ask`/exit code passes through, only path-resolution / unexpected errors fail open — it can still ask). (2) UserPromptSubmit retrieval-reminder (ADVISORY, D-017). (3) UserPromptSubmit project-focus injector (ADVISORY, D-025). None of these hooks deny; advisory hooks cannot block at all.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" lock-conflict "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || python -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" lock-conflict "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || py -3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" lock-conflict "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py"

python3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" retrieval-reminder "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || python -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" retrieval-reminder "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || py -3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" retrieval-reminder "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py"

python3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" project-focus "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || python -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" project-focus "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py" || py -3 -c "import os,sys,runpy;r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT');p=os.path.join(r,'hooks','hook_launcher.py') if r else '';p=p if os.path.isfile(p) else (sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else '');runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.isfile(p)) else None" project-focus "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hook_launcher.py"
